company.name: Brito Mobiles

products.name: Samsung Galaxy A17
products.description: Powerful camera phone with premium design and smooth performance.
products.fullDescription: The Samsung Galaxy A17 features a powerful camera system, premium design, smooth performance, and excellent battery life. Perfect for photography lovers and everyday users.

products.name: Samsung Galaxy A07
products.description: Great value smartphone with big battery and fast charging.
products.fullDescription: Samsung Galaxy A07 comes with a massive battery, fast charging support, vibrant display, and decent camera setup. Ideal for students and users who need reliable performance on a budget.

products.name: Infinix Hot 50
products.description: Reliable smartphone with good camera and performance.
products.fullDescription: Infinix Hot 50 offers excellent battery life, smooth performance, and a beautiful design. Great choice for daily use, social media, and light gaming.

products.name: Infinix Note 50
products.description: Popular phone with excellent display and software support.
products.fullDescription: Infinix Note 50 features a superb display, long software update support, reliable cameras, and solid build quality.

products.name: Bluetooth Speaker Oraimo
products.fullDescription: Oraimo Bluetooth speaker delivers loud, clear sound with long battery life. Perfect for parties, outdoor use, or home.

products.name: Lenovo IdeaPad Laptop
products.description: Budget laptop suitable for students and basic work.
products.fullDescription: Lenovo IdeaPad offers good performance for everyday tasks like browsing, Microsoft Office, online classes, and light multimedia.

products.name: Dell Inspiron 14
products.description: Powerful everyday laptop with good battery life.
products.fullDescription: Dell Inspiron 14 is a versatile laptop with excellent build quality, comfortable keyboard, and strong performance for work and study.

products.name: Connest Multiple Thing
products.description: Charger, earphones, case and screen protector combo.
products.fullDescription: Complete accessory bundle including fast charger, wired earphones, protective case and tempered glass screen protector.

staff.name: John Banda
staff.quote: We help our customers find the perfect phone or laptop that matches their needs and budget.

staff.name: Trisha Mwanza
staff.quote: Our goal is to make every customer happy with their purchase and provide excellent after-sales support.
